old_value: {"id":"chai-2oa","title":"Keyed reconciliation silently corrupts DOM when keys are duplicated","description":"`diff_children_keyed` uses `Map[String, (Int, VNode)]`, so duplicate keys overwrite previous entries. This can leave old duplicate-key nodes untracked and never removed, resulting in stale DOM nodes and nondeterministic updates.\n\nFix direction: validate uniqueness of keys in both old and new keyed lists and abort on duplicates with a precise message (`duplicate key: ...`).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-3zq","title":"Unmounted component handles retain live dispatch closures","description":"When a component slot is removed, `Handle.dispatch` is not invalidated. Parents that keep a handle can still `Cmd::send` into an unmounted child loop, retaining model/queue closures and causing ghost updates + memory retention.\n\nFix direction: track handles per slot and set them to no-op when the slot is removed, or gate dispatch by slot liveness.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-ezb","title":"SPA link helper breaks modified-click/new-tab browser behavior","description":"`link()` always calls `prevent_default()` on click and dispatches `on_nav`. This blocks ctrl/cmd-click, shift-click, middle-click, and other native navigation semantics.\n\nFix direction: intercept only primary unmodified clicks targeting same browsing context; otherwise allow native browser behavior.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: Implemented keyed/non-keyed mode-switch fallback replacement in diff_children
Added duplicate-key guards for old/new keyed children in reconciliation
Unmount now invalidates component handles with one-time warning dispatch
link() now intercepts only plain primary same-tab clicks via conditional event dispatch
{"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-y6y","title":"Reduce queue copy churn in runtime dispatch loops","description":"`app.boot`, component dispatch loops, and pending init command draining repeatedly call `copy()` + `clear()` on arrays each cycle. Under bursty message loads this adds avoidable allocations and throughput overhead.\n\nFix direction: use double-buffer queue swapping or index-based draining to preserve reentrancy without cloning full arrays each cycle.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-9qj","title":"README on_key_down prevent_default docs mismatch runtime signature","description":"README says `prevent_default=true` for `Sub::on_key_down`, but API expects a predicate `(String) -\u003e Bool`. This mismatch can mislead users and cause compile-time friction.\n\nFix direction: update docs example and explanation to show predicate usage.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:42Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-xtv","title":"Consolidate repetitive VNode tag constructors with generation","description":"`vnode.mbt` contains many near-identical wrappers (`div`, `span`, `h1`, `h2`, ...), each delegating to `el`. This is easy to drift and increases maintenance overhead.\n\nFix direction: generate wrappers from a tag list (script or macro) and keep a single source of truth for supported elements.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:50Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:50Z"}

new_value: Replaced queue copy/clear loops with index-based draining in app/component runtime
Updated README on_key_down docs to show predicate-based prevent_default usage
Added vnode tag helper generator script and generated wrapper block markers

{"description":"Add DOM-focused unit tests for reconciliation behavior in `diff.mbt`.

Scope:
- Attribute/property/event/style patching and removals
- Child diff behavior for append/remove/replace flows
- Keyed reconciliation correctness (reorder/move/insert/remove)
- Failure behavior for mixed keyed/non-keyed siblings and duplicate keys
- Mode-switch replacement behavior (keyed <-> non-keyed) and stale-node prevention

Tests should directly assert DOM state transitions via harness fixtures."}

{"description":"Add component lifecycle/unit tests for isolated component runtime semantics.

Scope:
- Stable identity behavior with positional vs explicit ids
- Handle wiring, `Cmd::send`, and disconnected-handle warning-once behavior
- Pending init command draining and render-trigger behavior
- Slot cleanup/teardown when components disappear across renders

Include regression tests for unmounted handle dispatch behavior."}
